Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x62FA "NECROMANCER-0400-62FA" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$3e sta $01 jsr $0400 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Necromancer.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $0400 which: 1. turns off interrupts from the two CIA chips and acks any pending CIA interrupts 2. copies 512 bytes of data from $0430 down to $0000 so that the dump can start at $0400 3. sets the stack pointer to $BE 4. sets CIA #2 Port B ($DD01) to $5A (this was originally set during the loading process and allows the game to run correctly) 5. re-enables raster interrupts (CLI) 6. finally jumps to the entry point at $62FA (it couldn't use RTS because of the copy overwriting the stack)
